content: Section "Users" includes the users you selected in the previous step. By default, it is always enabled and can't be unselected.

comment.text: The "UsersSectionDescription" translation key provides a textual explanation for the "Users" section in the import step process. It helps to inform users that this section always includes selected users and cannot be disabled by default. This text typically appears on-screen as a tooltip or within an import component.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'La sección' (feminine) is referred to as 'habilitado' (masculine). It should be 'habilitada' to match the subject.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: La sección "Usuarios" incluye los usuarios que ha seleccionado en el paso anterior. De forma predeterminada, siempre está habilitada y no se puede deseleccionar.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Grammatical error in the past participle: 'sélectionné' should be 'sélectionnés' to agree with the plural direct object 'utilisateurs' placed before the verb.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: La section Utilisateurs comprend les utilisateurs que vous avez sélectionnés à l'étape précédente. Par défaut, cette option est toujours activée et impossible à désactiver.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'La sezione' (feminine) is referred to as 'abilitato' and 'deselezionato' (masculine). It should be 'abilitata' and 'deselezionata' to match the subject 'sezione'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: La sezione "Utenti" include gli utenti selezionati nel passaggio precedente. Per impostazione predefinita, è sempre abilitata e non può essere deselezionata.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Latvian translation uses 'tas' (it - masculine) to refer to 'Sadaļa' (Section - feminine), and 'to' (them - accusative) to refer to 'Sadaļa' (Section - feminine), creating grammatical gender disagreement that obscures whether the 'section' or the 'users' cannot be unselected.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sadaļā "Lietotāji" ir iekļauti lietotāji, kurus atlasījāt iepriekšējā darbībā. Pēc noklusējuma tā vienmēr ir iespējota un to nevar izslēgt.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'Ukownicy' is not a valid Polish word (likely a hallucination or typo for 'Użytkownicy'). Additionally, 'wona' is not a valid Polish word in this context (likely a typo for 'włączona').
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Sekcja „Użytkownicy” zawiera użytkowników wybranych w poprzednim kroku. Domyślnie jest ona zawsze włączona i nie można jej odznaczyć.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'A seção' (feminine) is referred to as 'ativado' and 'desmarcado' (masculine). It should be 'ativada' and 'desmarcada' to agree with 'seção'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: A seção "Usuários" inclui os usuários selecionados na etapa anterior. Por padrão, está sempre ativada e não pode ser desmarcada.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: Gender disagreement: 'A seção' (feminine) is referred to as 'ativado' and 'desmarcado' (masculine). It should be 'ativada' and 'desmarcada' to agree with 'seção'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: A seção "Usuários" inclui os usuários selecionados na etapa anterior. Por padrão, está sempre ativada e não pode ser desmarcada.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word for 'Users' is misspelled as 'පරිශ්‍රීලකයින්' (parishrilakayin) instead of the correct 'පරිශීලකයින්' (parishilakayin). This is a critical spelling error in a key technical term.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: "පරිශීලකයින්" කොටසට ඔබ කලින් පියවරේ දී තෝරාගත් පරිශීලකයින් ඇතුළත් වේ. පෙරනිමි පරිදි එය සැමවිටම සබල අතර තේරීම ඉවතලීමට නොහැකිය.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Slovenian translation uses the masculine gender 'ga' (referring to 'razdelek') when it should refer to the section 'razdelek' or the state of being enabled. More importantly, 'preklicati' (to cancel/revoke) is an incorrect translation for 'unselected' in the context of a checkbox or setting; 'odklopljeno' or 'izbrano' would be more accurate. However, the most critical error is the gender mismatch: 'Razdelek... je vedno omogočeno' (Masculine subject + Neuter predicate).
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Razdelek "Uporabniki" vključuje uporabnike, ki ste jih izbrali v prejšnjem koraku. Privzeto je vedno omogočen in ga ni mogoče izklopiti.
